gpt-5.5.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.5 Standard pricing with short-context rates of $5/1M input tokens, $0.50/1M cached input tokens, and $30/1M output tokens, and long-context rates of $10/1M input, $1/1M cached input, and $45/1M output. AutoShow uses uncached short-context rates by default and switches to the long-context rates when estimated or observed input context exceeds 272K tokens. Batch, flex, priority, regional uplifts, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

gpt-5.4.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.4 Standard pricing with short-context rates of $2.50/1M input tokens, $0.25/1M cached input tokens, and $15/1M output tokens, and long-context rates of $5/1M input, $0.50/1M cached input, and $22.50/1M output. AutoShow uses uncached short-context rates by default and switches to the long-context rates when estimated or observed input context exceeds 272K tokens. Batch, flex, priority, regional uplifts, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

gpt-5.4-pro.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.4 Pro Standard pricing with short-context rates of $30/1M input tokens and $180/1M output tokens, and long-context rates of $60/1M input and $270/1M output. AutoShow uses uncached short-context rates by default and switches to the long-context rates when estimated or observed input context exceeds 272K tokens. Batch, flex, priority, regional uplifts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

gpt-5.4-mini.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.4 Mini Standard pricing at $0.75/1M input tokens, $0.075/1M cached input tokens, and $4.50/1M output tokens. Batch, flex, priority, regional uplifts, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

gpt-5.4-nano.pricingNotes: OpenAI lists GPT-5.4 Nano Standard pricing at $0.20/1M input tokens, $0.02/1M cached input tokens, and $1.25/1M output tokens. Batch, flex, priority, regional uplifts, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

openai/gpt-oss-20b.description: GPT OSS 20B — open-weight model via Groq
openai/gpt-oss-20b.pricingNotes: Groq lists openai/gpt-oss-20b at $0.075/1M uncached input tokens, $0.0375/1M cached input tokens, and $0.30/1M output tokens. AutoShow uses uncached input pricing. Batch, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

openai/gpt-oss-120b.description: GPT OSS 120B — open-weight model via Groq
openai/gpt-oss-120b.pricingNotes: Groq lists openai/gpt-oss-120b at $0.15/1M uncached input tokens, $0.075/1M cached input tokens, and $0.60/1M output tokens. AutoShow uses uncached input pricing. Batch, cached-input discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

gemini-3.1-pro-preview.pricingNotes: Gemini 3.1 Pro Preview Standard pricing is $2/1M input tokens and $12/1M output tokens for prompts up to 200K tokens, and $4/1M input tokens and $18/1M output tokens for prompts over 200K tokens. AutoShow uses uncached paid Standard pricing and switches bands from estimated or observed input tokens. Free tier, batch/flex/priority prices, context caching, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

gemini-3.1-flash-lite.pricingNotes: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Standard pricing is $0.25/1M text/image/video input tokens, $0.50/1M audio input tokens, and $1.50/1M output tokens. AutoShow uses text input pricing for step-3 LLM estimates. Free tier, batch/flex/priority prices, context caching, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview.pricingNotes: Compatibility alias for gemini-3.1-flash-lite. Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite Standard pricing is $0.25/1M text/image/video input tokens, $0.50/1M audio input tokens, and $1.50/1M output tokens. AutoShow uses text input pricing for step-3 LLM estimates. Free tier, batch/flex/priority prices, context caching, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

claude-opus-4-7.description: Claude Opus 4.7 — most capable generally available model
claude-opus-4-7.pricingNotes: Anthropic lists Claude Opus 4.7 standard token pricing at $5/1M input tokens and $25/1M output tokens. Prompt caching, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

claude-sonnet-4-6.pricingNotes: Anthropic lists Claude Sonnet 4.6 standard token pricing at $3/1M input tokens and $15/1M output tokens. Prompt caching, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

claude-haiku-4-5.pricingNotes: Anthropic lists Claude Haiku 4.5 standard token pricing at $1/1M input tokens and $5/1M output tokens. Prompt caching, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

minimax.description: MiniMax language models via Anthropic-compatible API

MiniMax-M2.7.description: MiniMax M2.7 — Beginning the journey of recursive self-improvement
MiniMax-M2.7.pricingNotes: MiniMax lists MiniMax-M2.7 pay-as-you-go pricing at $0.30/1M input tokens and $1.20/1M output tokens. Cache discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed.description: MiniMax M2.7 Highspeed — same performance, faster and more agile
MiniMax-M2.7-highspeed.pricingNotes: MiniMax lists MiniMax-M2.7 Highspeed pay-as-you-go pricing at $0.60/1M input tokens and $2.40/1M output tokens. Cache discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

grok-4.3.pricingTier: xAI public Chat API token pricing
grok-4.3.pricingNotes: xAI lists Grok 4.3 at $1.25/1M input tokens, $0.20/1M cached input tokens, and $2.50/1M output tokens. The Grok 4.3 model page states requests exceeding the 200K context window use higher context pricing, but the public pricing page does not publish numeric higher-context rates. AutoShow uses the listed standard rates and emits a pricing note when observed or estimated input context exceeds 200K tokens. Batch, cached-input discounts, regional differences, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

higherContextPricing.note: xAI documents higher context pricing for requests exceeding 200K context tokens, but public docs do not provide numeric higher-context rates. This estimate uses standard listed rates and may understate cost.

grok-4.20-reasoning.pricingTier: xAI public Chat API token pricing
grok-4.20-reasoning.pricingNotes: xAI lists grok-4.20-0309-reasoning at $1.25/1M input tokens, $0.20/1M cached input tokens, and $2.50/1M output tokens. Batch, cached-input discounts, regional differences, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

grok-4.20-non-reasoning.pricingTier: xAI public Chat API token pricing
grok-4.20-non-reasoning.pricingNotes: xAI lists grok-4.20-0309-non-reasoning at $1.25/1M input tokens, $0.20/1M cached input tokens, and $2.50/1M output tokens. Batch, cached-input discounts, regional differences, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

glm-5.1.pricingNotes: Z.AI lists GLM-5.1 standard pricing at $1.40/1M input tokens and $4.40/1M output tokens. Cache discounts, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.

kimi-k2.6.pricingTier: Moonshot AI public API token pricing
kimi-k2.6.pricingNotes: Moonshot AI public pricing lists Kimi K2.6 at $0.95/1M input tokens and $4/1M output tokens. Cache discounts, batch discounts, enterprise pricing, taxes, and provider credits are ignored.
